conversations.content:
Hey! I'm going to Paris soon and I'm looking for a restaurant with vegan options.
Please recommend the restaurant with the highest rating, and if there are multiple options, choose the one with the cheapest price. Please tell me the restaurant's name and address.
Also, can you add a reminder to my calendar for October 15th to book a table? The event title should be 'Dinner at {restaurant_name}', and the location set to the restaurant's address.

<function_thought>
The user is looking for a restaurant in Paris that offers vegan options and wants a recommendation based on the highest rating and lowest price. Additionally, the user wants a calendar reminder for a dinner on October 15th. To accomplish this, I will start by retrieving all restaurants in Paris.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_all_restaurants_in_city(city="Paris")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

Restaurant in Paris: New Israeli Restaurant
Breizh Café
New Asiaway
Le Baratin
Bistrot Paul Bert
Royal Panda
The yard
China Garden
Miznon
Chez L'Ami Jean

Now that I have a list of restaurants in Paris, I will proceed to determine their cuisine types to identify which ones offer vegan options. 
</function_thought>
